lead: What do you want to build toward? Pick one — habits do the rest.
titlePlaceholder: e.g. Lose weight for the wedding
deleteBody: Your activities stay — only this goal is removed.

focus.unavailable: This goal is no longer available.

focus.prepHint: Personal goals that help you get ready. In Settings, choose whether they just remind you or also feed this goal's progress.

focus.calHint: Tap a day to schedule these activities; ✓ marks days you completed them.
